name: Nightbane — Basic Skill Package
description: Default R.C.C. skill package for Nightbane who were normal young adults or students at the Becoming — typical Dark Day campaign characters with high-school or early college backgrounds.

occSkillsCore.label: One Electrical, Mechanical, Science, or Technical skill of choice

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand must be purchased as a related skill (Basic = 1 slot, Expert = 2, Martial Arts or Assassin = 3). Applies to the Facade only — Morphus has innate Martial Arts.

classAbilities.name: Civilian Weapon Proficiencies
classAbilities.description: Related W.P. selections are limited to civilian weapons (no military arms such as assault rifles or heavy weapons).

name: Nightbane — Resistance / Spook Squad
description: Militant or guerrilla faction training — or a character who was serving in the military at the Becoming. Includes basic military skills and Facade Hand to Hand: Basic.

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand: Basic is included. Upgrade to Expert for one related skill, or Martial Arts/Assassin for two related skills. Facade only — Morphus has innate Martial Arts.

name: Nightbane — Nocturne / Seeker / Lightbringer
description: Scholastic and magically oriented faction training — broad technical and scientific knowledge, Nightbane Lore, and two foreign languages.

occSkillsCore.label: Two languages of choice (spoken and literacy)
Two Science or Technical skills of choice

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand must be purchased as a related skill (Basic = 1, Expert = 2, Martial Arts/Assassin = 3). Facade only.

classAbilities.name: Civilian Weapon Proficiencies
classAbilities.description: Related W.P. selections are limited to civilian weapons.

name: Nightbane — Warlord
description: Street-survival training for Nightbane Warlords or gang members at the Becoming — locks, prowling, streetwise, and brawling over advanced education.

classAbilities.name: Literacy
classAbilities.description: Native literacy is not in the core package — select Literacy as a related skill if desired (+10% when taken from the book list).

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand: Basic included. Upgrade to Expert for one related skill, or Martial Arts/Assassin for two. Facade only.

name: Guardian R.C.C. Skills
description: Shadow O.C.C. for the Guardian R.C.C. — memory loss leaves 10 related + 8 secondary skills from a simple, mostly non-technological list. Communications: basic radio only; Domestic +10%; Medical: First Aid, Holistic Medicine, Paramedic +10%; Pilot: automobile, motorcycle, horsemanship +5%; Technical +5%; Wilderness +5%; Electrical, Espionage, Mechanical, Military, Rogue, and Science forbidden. +1 related skill at levels 3, 6, 9, and 12. Typically Hand to Hand: Basic.

classAbilities.name: Limited skill memory
classAbilities.description: All new skills start at base level. Guardians rarely use weapons and prefer natural abilities over firearms.

classAbilities.name: Starting resources
classAbilities.description: Begin with street clothing and 2D4×10 dollars. Through allies and other Guardians, funds may increase to 2D6×100 (usually spent on necessities and helping others).

weapons: Rarely armed — prefers natural abilities over guns.

name: Wampyr R.C.C. Skills
description: Shadow O.C.C. for the Wampyr R.C.C. — 10 related + 8 secondary skills at 1st level (pre-transformation occupation/education; Wampyrs retain memories of their past life). Hand to Hand purchased from related slots. +1 related skill at levels 4, 7, 10, and 12.

classAbilities.name: Pre-transformation skills
classAbilities.description: Select related and secondary skills that match the character's former life before vampiric transformation.

name: Doppleganger R.C.C. Skills
description: Shadow O.C.C. for the Doppleganger R.C.C. — R.C.C. skills same as normal humans. Select 10 related + 8 secondary skills reflecting the Earth double's O.C.C., education, and life (player-character Dopplegangers are rolled up normally). Hand to Hand purchased from related slots (same as humans). For a Doppleganger of a specific NPC/PC, mirror that character's attributes and roll 1D6 per skill: 1–2 unknown, 3–4 at −10% of the double's level, 5–6 at the same level.

classAbilities.name: Counterpart skills
classAbilities.description: Skill picks should reflect the Earth double's O.C.C. and background. Magician doubles may learn magic; psychic doubles use counterpart psionics at two-thirds I.S.P.; all others are mundane unless the 40% minor-psionic awakening applies.

name: Hound Master R.C.C. Skills
description: Shadow O.C.C. for the Hound Master R.C.C. — minimal fixed skill package on the race row (tracking 85%, languages, swimming/climbing 98%, W.P. Polearm and Battle Axe). Hand to Hand: Assassin at 1st level. No related or secondary skill picks. I.S.P. base on race (M.E. + 1D6×10) plus 2D6 per level.

classAbilities.name: Fixed R.C.C. package
classAbilities.description: All R.C.C. skills are granted on the race row. Starts with psionic Mind Block and Empathy plus Illusion Shells (see race class abilities).

name: Sorcerer O.C.C.
description: Bookish arcane scholar — meticulous study of formulas, rituals, and incantations. Sorcerers sense ley lines and nexus points, may learn spells of any level through study (Pursuit of Magic), and wield wizard magic with strong saves versus the supernatural.

occSkillsCore.label: One additional Technical skill of choice

classAbilities.name: Understand the Principles of Magic
classAbilities.description: Recognize authentic occult materials, determine general purpose of items, and identify supernatural forces involved.

classAbilities.name: Sense Ley Lines and Nexus Points
classAbilities.description: See ley lines and nexus psychic energy within line of sight or one mile (1.6 km), whichever is less.

classAbilities.name: Learning New Spells
classAbilities.description: Additional spells and rituals of any magic level may be learned or purchased at any time regardless of experience level (Pursuit of Magic, Nightbane RPG p. 121+).

miscellaneous: Small occult library (history, occult, myths and legends)

finances.blackMarketAssets: 3D6*1000 in property (equipment, vehicles and similar items)

name: Mystic O.C.C.
description: Shamanistic intuitive magic-user and major psionic — rainmakers, medicine men, and spiritual paths from cultures worldwide. Spell knowledge is gained through inner revelation; cannot learn spells independently outside the O.C.C. roadmap.

classAbilities.name: Intuitive Spell Knowledge
classAbilities.description: Cannot learn or purchase spells independently; all magic comes from intuitive roadmap selections at each level of experience.

classAbilities.name: Initial Psionic Grants
classAbilities.description: At 1st level, select three additional Sensitive abilities and two Healer abilities beyond the four auto-granted powers (Clairvoyance, Exorcism, Sense Evil, Sixth Sense).

specializations.name: Wealth-oriented Mystic
specializations.description: Rare mystic with substantial property, vehicles, and prestige — easily targeted after Dark Day.

name: Nightbane Sorcerer O.C.C.
description: Rare Nightbane trained in arcane scholarship — draws on both wizard magic and a single Nightbane Talent, with full Nightbane R.C.C. powers. P.P.E. is often spent acquiring additional Talents at the cost of spell flexibility.

occSkillsCore.label: One additional Technical skill of choice

classAbilities.name: Understand the Principles of Magic
classAbilities.description: Same as the Sorcerer O.C.C.

classAbilities.name: Sense Ley Lines and Nexus Points
classAbilities.description: Same as the Sorcerer O.C.C.

classAbilities.name: Nightbane R.C.C. Abilities
classAbilities.description: Retains all natural Nightbane R.C.C. powers (Becoming, Morphus, Mirror Walk, etc.).

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand selections apply to the Facade only; Morphus has innate Martial Arts.

classAbilities.name: Talent and P.P.E. Trade-off
classAbilities.description: Gains only one Talent at 1st level with no further Talent levels; additional Talents may be purchased with permanent P.P.E. expenditure.

classAbilities.name: Learning New Spells
classAbilities.description: May learn or purchase spells of any level anytime (Pursuit of Magic).

finances.blackMarketAssets: 2D4*1000 in property (equipment, vehicles and similar items)

name: Nightbane Mystic O.C.C.
description: The most common magic-practicing Nightbane — intuitive shaman of Nightlands energies with no psionic potential, relying on Talents and a restrictive spell roadmap. Retains full Nightbane R.C.C. powers.

classAbilities.name: No Psionic Potential
classAbilities.description: Unlike human mystics, Nightbane mystics have no I.S.P. or psionic powers; they rely on Talents to remain in tune with the world.

classAbilities.name: Intuitive Spell Knowledge
classAbilities.description: Cannot learn spells independently; spell selections follow the O.C.C. roadmap only.

classAbilities.name: Nightbane R.C.C. Abilities
classAbilities.description: Retains all natural Nightbane R.C.C. powers.

classAbilities.name: Facade Hand to Hand
classAbilities.description: Hand to Hand selections apply to the Facade only; Morphus has innate Martial Arts.

classAbilities.name: Talent and P.P.E. Trade-off
classAbilities.description: Additional Talents may be purchased with P.P.E., but seldom more than one or two beyond the level grants.

specializations.name: Wealth-oriented Mystic
specializations.description: Rare Nightbane mystic with property and investments — high visibility after Dark Day.

name: Psychic P.C.C.
description: Human whose latent psychic gifts surged after Dark Day — sensing the supernatural, manipulating the world with the mind, and healing wounds. Persecuted by the monster-controlled government; many join Nightbane, secret societies, or fight back as mercenaries and adventurers.
packageNotes: High I.Q. and M.E. are strongly recommended.
Requires a race that permits psionic abilities.
Only psionic powers are required — no minimum attribute scores.

occSkillsCore.label: Four work-related or educational skills of choice

classAbilities.name: Master Psionic
classAbilities.description: Save vs psionic attack on a d20 roll of 10 or higher (plus M.E. and other bonuses).

classAbilities.name: Background Skills
classAbilities.description: Work or education background determines the four core skill picks — college students lean scientific/technical; blue-collar workers lean mechanical, electronic, or domestic trades.

miscellaneous: Basic car, pick-up truck, or motorcycle

name: Priest of Night O.C.C.
description: Shadow O.C.C. for `race_priest_of_night` — human cult fanatic granted magic by the Ba'al. Gift of Power attribute boosts and +30 S.D.C./+3D6 H.P. live on the race row; spell picks and P.P.E. engine here. Full access to Nightlands, Nightlord, and minion spell lists.

classAbilities.name: Gift of Power (race row)
classAbilities.description: M.A. and P.B. +8 or minimum 18; P.S. +4 and P.P. +2 on race row. Superhuman strength for 2 P.P.E./minute; +30 S.D.C. and +3D6 H.P. encoded in race vitals.

classAbilities.name: Nightlands Spell Access
classAbilities.description: May learn any spell dealing with the Nightlands, Nightlords, or their minions in addition to wizard-school picks.

name: Master Vampire R.C.C.
description: Shadow O.C.C. for `race_master_vampire` — willing first-generation undead. Retains pre-transformation skills frozen at rebirth proficiency (O.C.C. skill bonuses forgotten; I.Q. bonus only). +3 new skills per 100 years of unlife at 2nd-level proficiency (frozen). Vampire powers, psionics, and combat on the race row.

classAbilities.name: Frozen Pre-Rebirth Skills
classAbilities.description: Select up to ten related skills representing the vampire's former life. Proficiencies frozen at transformation level; O.C.C. skill bonuses do not apply — only I.Q. bonus (if any). Skills never increase.

classAbilities.name: Centuries of Unlife
classAbilities.description: Gain three additional skills (same category limits) for every 100 years as a vampire. All such skills start at 2nd-level proficiency and never increase.

classAbilities.name: Pre-Rebirth Magic (optional)
classAbilities.description: If the character knew magic before undeath, retain half or full spell list at frozen power levels — player/GM selects at creation. No new spells; P.P.E. frozen at 1D6×10 on race row.

classAbilities.name: Super-Hypnotic Suggestion
classAbilities.description: Vampire-exclusive (p. 186): 20 I.S.P., line-of-sight eye contact (eyes glow red/yellow), 5 minutes per level, standard save; victim obeys commands except those utterly against alignment.

name: Secondary Vampire R.C.C.
description: Shadow O.C.C. for `race_secondary_vampire` — optional player undead. Ten retained skills from former life at 1st-level proficiency (frozen; never increase). +2 related skills at levels 3, 6, 9, 11, and 13. Vampire powers and combat on the race row.

classAbilities.name: Frozen Retained Skills
classAbilities.description: Select ten related skills from allowed categories representing the vampire's former life. All start at 1st-level proficiency and never increase.

classAbilities.name: Pre-Rebirth Magic (optional)
classAbilities.description: If the character knew magic before undeath, player selects half of remembered spells at frozen levels. P.P.E. frozen at 1D4×10 on race row; no new spells.

classAbilities.name: Equipment Preference
classAbilities.description: Prefer natural powers over technology; may drive a car or rarely use a gun.

name: Wild Vampire R.C.C.
description: Shadow O.C.C. for `race_wild_vampire` — optional player undead. Six retained skills from former life at 2nd-level proficiency (frozen; no skill bonuses). +1 secondary skill at levels 2, 4, 6, 8, 11, and 14. Vampire powers and combat on the race row.

classAbilities.name: Frozen Retained Skills
classAbilities.description: Select six related skills from allowed categories. All frozen at 2nd-level proficiency; no O.C.C. skill bonuses apply; never increase.

classAbilities.name: Secondary Skill Growth
classAbilities.description: One new secondary skill at levels 2, 4, 6, 8, 11, and 14 — starts at 1st-level proficiency and never increases.

classAbilities.name: Weapons
classAbilities.description: Prefer bare hands and fangs over technology; lack patience for most weapons.

name: Snake Bird R.C.C.
description: Shadow O.C.C. for `race_snake_bird` — natural spell casters sharing the Mystic experience table. Fixed racial skills on the race row (Prowl 62%, track by smell 50%, Lore: Magic +20%, Dragonese). Eight secondary skills (typically Technical; pilot/mechanic skills discouraged). Natural-abilities combat; no Hand to Hand program. P.P.E. P.E.×5 + 12/level.

classAbilities.name: Intuitive Spell Knowledge
classAbilities.description: Six spells (levels 1–3) at 1st level; two additional spells per level equal to or below current experience level. Cannot learn spells independently outside the roadmap. G.M. may permit spells from other Palladium lines per book note.

classAbilities.name: Mystic Magic Parity
classAbilities.description: All other magic-related abilities resolve as per the Mystic O.C.C. — no psychic abilities.

classAbilities.name: Secondary Skill Guidance
classAbilities.description: Eight secondary skills limited by background and common sense; most tend toward Technical category.
